title: IRGC 'Martyred Commander' 5-day drill near Tehran — simulates US invasion, codenamed 'Labbayk Ya Khamenei'
snippet: IRGC Tehran Mohammad Rasulullah Corps concluded 5-day large-scale exercise simulating US-Israeli invasion near Tehran. Codenamed 'Labbayk Ya Khamenei' in honor of late Supreme Leader. General Hassan Hassanzadeh announced full readiness of IRGC and Basij battalions. Practiced individual/group tactics for confronting enemy in various terrains.
tag_reason: IRGC exercise reported 5/13, not previously covered
